question: What happens if a Master Administrator is not enrolled? (CE products)
answer: A new CE product without an enrolled Master Administrator cannot authenticate or change settings. However, connect the device to BioStar to enroll a Master Administrator.

question: Is Master Administrator setting supported after firmware upgrade on an existing device? (CE products)
answer:
Master Administrator is supported only on CE products with a CE-marked label.
Use the label sticker on the back of the product to identify CE products and Global (Non-CE) products. For details, see Master Administrator support policy.

question: Can a Master Administrator be enrolled on a slave device? (CE products)
answer: Yes. You can register a Master Administrator on a slave device.
